summary: Awful recording quality with no notable musical highlights mentioned
review: Both reviewers focus on the audio, describing it as virtually unusable – one likening it to a dump‑side tap and the other offering only a cryptic comment. No performance details or standout moments are provided, making this release more of a curiosity than a listenable show.

ai_rating.rationale: One reviewer gave 1 star citing terrible sound; the other gave 3 stars but offered no substantive feedback. With only two brief reviews, confidence is medium and the overall rating reflects poor recording quality and lack of musical commentary.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as sounding like it was recorded from a dumpster outside the venue; extremely muffled, low fidelity, likely distant audience tap.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No comments on set structure or performance quality were provided.
